title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods
jsonLd.description:
MTR Foods is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MTR Foods:
MTR Foods is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods!
